scripts.dev: bun run routes:gen && concurrently --restart-tries=-1 --restart-after=1000 --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'green,cyan' 'bun run server:dev' 'bun run client:dev'
scripts.build: bun run routes:gen && bun --filter client build
scripts.preview: bun run build && SERVE_CLIENT=1 API_PORT=${PORT:-3000} bun server/src/index.ts
scripts.test: sh -c 'files=$(find client/src shared server/src -type f \( -name "*.test.ts" -o -name "*.test.tsx" \) -print); [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0; bun test $files --pass-with-no-tests'
scripts.test:ui: sh -c 'files=$(find client/src -type f -name "*.test.tsx" -print); [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0; bun test $files --pass-with-no-tests'
